description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named FISCO-BCOS GitHub Actions that triggers on push events to all branches except those matching **-1.3 or **-1.5, tags except v1.*, and paths except docs/**, Changelog.md, and README.md. Also trigger on pull requests and published releases. The workflow should have a build job running on a matrix of ubuntu-18.04 and macos-latest, checking out code, using cache for dependencies and ccache, installing OS-specific dependencies, configuring and compiling the project, and running unit tests. Additionally, run an integration test job on macos-latest with similar setup but different cache keys and a different test script.
